message:
lint: add #[must_use] to Builder struct types, remove redundant method annotations (bd-2sg75)

Move #[must_use] from individual builder methods up to the struct level
for ThemeBuilder, DialogBuilder, TileDiffBuilder, CapabilityProfileBuilder,
AppBuilder, EffectSequenceBuilder, ValidatorBuilder, and HighlightThemeBuilder.
This eliminates clippy::double_must_use while providing the same safety
guarantees more concisely.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
